en.start_welcome:
🌟 Welcome to the VIP Passive Income Bot!

Choose your language:
en.welcome_message: 🎉 Welcome to the VIP Passive Income Bot! 💰 How it works: • Pay 1000 ⭐ once for VIP access (7 days) • Get your unique referral link • Invite friends and earn from 5 levels: → Level 1: 40% (400 ⭐) → Level 2: 20% (200 ⭐) → Level 3: 10% (100 ⭐) → Level 4: 5% (50 ⭐) → Level 5: 3% (30 ⭐) 🎯 Just 3 referrals = profit! 3 × 400 = 1,200 ⭐ (already in the green!) 🎁 Bonuses: ✨ Ranks: Earn +5% to +15% extra 🎁 Chests: Every 10th referral = prize up to 1,000 ⭐ 🏆 Leaderboard: Top 3 weekly win 500/300/150 ⭐ 🎄 New Year: 5 refs in 24h = x2 forever! 📈 100% automated system Everything happens automatically - just invite and earn! 🚀
en.referrals_text: 👥 Your Referral Network 📊 Level 1: {level1} refs (40% = {level1_earned} ⭐) 📊 Level 2: {level2} refs (20% = {level2_earned} ⭐) 📊 Level 3: {level3} refs (10% = {level3_earned} ⭐) 📊 Level 4: {level4} refs (5% = {level4_earned} ⭐) 📊 Level 5: {level5} refs (3% = {level5_earned} ⭐) 💰 Total from referrals: {total} ⭐

✅ Withdrawal request sent!

Amount: {amount} ⭐
Admin will process it soon.

Buy now: 1000 ⭐ for 7 days
